name: 三国阵
short_description: 《三国阵》is a unique 2D confrontation game. The simple and easy-to-understand way of deploying troops on the battlefield frees up your hands. You just need to send out troops, and the soldiers will keep fighting to help you defeat the enemies.
detailed_description:
《三国阵》is a unique 2D confrontation game, allowing players to dispatch a large number of soldiers and experience the thrill of battlefield combat.

  • Pre-battle Preparation:
    Players can freely allocate resources to form soldier teams of different arms. They can recruit generals with distinct characteristics. Each general possesses unique skills that can play a crucial role in the battle. At the same time, players need to collect various props, such as potions that enhance soldiers' attack power and siege weapons that can destroy the enemy's city walls, making full preparations for the battle.

  • Strategic Combat:
    During the battle, players need to flexibly dispatch soldiers and generals according to the enemy's layout and the battlefield situation. They can send powerful generals to turn the tide of the battle, or use props at critical moments to break the stalemate. The soldiers cooperate closely, presenting the intensity of large-scale team battles.

  • Diverse Generals:
    There are many generals in the game that players can use after purchasing them. These generals have different effects. Players can focus on a single general or, according to the battlefield situation, bring different generals to deal with different enemies.

  • Protecting the City Wall:
    Players will have their own city walls. In each battle, the city walls may be damaged. Pay attention to protecting your city walls. Otherwise, when your city wall is destroyed, you will need to wait for a period of time to repair it.
